topic_score_fields.name: reader_pain
topic_score_fields.description: How urgent and common the reader problem is.

topic_score_fields.name: search_intent
topic_score_fields.description: How clearly the article can satisfy a search query.

topic_score_fields.name: monetization_fit
topic_score_fields.description: How naturally affiliate or partner links fit the article.

topic_score_fields.name: evidence_readiness
topic_score_fields.description: How ready the sources, screenshots, examples, or hands-on notes are.

topic_score_fields.name: internal_link_value
topic_score_fields.description: How much the article strengthens site architecture and conversion paths.
